final:
module mux_4to1(
	input 	in0,
	input 	in1,
	input 	in2,
	input 	in3,
	input 	[1:0] sel,
	output 	out
);

assign out = (sel == 2'b00) ? in0 :
             (sel == 2'b01) ? in1 :
             (sel == 2'b10) ? in2 :
                              in3;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out <= ~in0; out <= ~in1; out <= ~in2; out <= ~in3;
    end
  end

endmodule
